ReplayCachePolicy.description: Replay cache policy controlling when ATAS should be queried and when snapshots become durable.

fetch_only_when_missing.description: Only fetch from ATAS when the replay packet is missing from local storage.
fetch_only_when_missing.title: Fetch Only When Missing

max_verifications_per_day.description: Maximum number of verification passes allowed per day.
max_verifications_per_day.title: Max Verifications Per Day

verification_passes_to_lock.description: How many successful verifications are required before the replay packet is locked as durable.
verification_passes_to_lock.title: Verification Passes To Lock

manual_reimport_required_after_invalidat.description: Whether replay acquisition must stay disabled until the operator explicitly re-enables it after invalidation.
manual_reimport_required_after_invalidat.title: Manual Reimport Required After Invalidation

ReplayCachePolicy.title: ReplayCachePolicy

ReplayVerificationState.description: Current verification state of the replay packet stored in the workbench cache.

status.description: Verification state of the cached replay packet.

verification_count.description: How many successful verification passes have been completed for this replay packet.
verification_count.title: Verification Count

last_verified_at.description: When the replay packet was last verified against ATAS or other trusted source.
last_verified_at.title: Last Verified At

next_verification_due_at.description: Next time a verification pass is allowed or required.
next_verification_due_at.title: Next Verification Due At

invalidated_at.description: When the replay packet was manually invalidated, if it was invalidated.
invalidated_at.title: Invalidated At

invalidation_reason.description: Optional operator note explaining why the replay packet was invalidated.
invalidation_reason.title: Invalidation Reason

locked_until_manual_reset.description: Whether this replay packet should remain durable until the operator manually invalidates it.
locked_until_manual_reset.title: Locked Until Manual Reset

ReplayVerificationState.title: ReplayVerificationState

acquisition_mode.description: Whether this replay packet was fetched from ATAS or reused from cache.

verification_status.description: Current verification status for the replay packet.

verification_count.description: How many successful verification passes have been recorded.
verification_count.title: Verification Count

locked_until_manual_reset.description: Whether the replay packet is now durable until manual invalidation.
locked_until_manual_reset.title: Locked Until Manual Reset

fetch_only_when_missing.description: Whether the cache policy forbids reacquisition while local data exists.
fetch_only_when_missing.title: Fetch Only When Missing

max_verifications_per_day.description: How many verification passes are allowed per day.
max_verifications_per_day.title: Max Verifications Per Day

verification_passes_to_lock.description: How many verification passes are required before permanent retention.
verification_passes_to_lock.title: Verification Passes To Lock

focus_region_count.description: How many focus regions were stored.

strategy_candidate_count.description: How many strategy-library candidates were attached.

action.description: Whether the builder reused cache, built locally, or needs ATAS history.

cache_key.description: Replay cache key handled by this request.

reason.description: Short explanation of the chosen action.

local_message_count.description: How many local continuous-state messages matched the request window.

summary.description: Stored or newly created replay summary when available.

cache_record.description: Latest cache record after the build decision.

atas_fetch_request.description: Minimal ATAS history request guidance when local history is insufficient.

acquisition_mode.description: Whether the packet came from cache reuse or ATAS fetch.
